title: [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4
issue_summary:
# [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4

- Issue: SSD-SAMPLE-1
- Version: 2026-04-18T09:00:00Z
- Source: jira

## Issue Fields
- Action: 0301: BSOD observed
0302: Retest in progress
- Affects Version/s: FwVersion880
- Component: FW
- Labels: BSOD
- Priority: Highest
- Report department: SV
- Resolution: Unresolved
- Root Cause: Undefined
- Severity: Major
- Status: In Progress
- Type: FW Bug

## Jira Markdown
# SSD-SAMPLE-1 [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4

## Issue Type
- **Type**: FW Bug
- **Family**: defect
- **Route**: fw\_bug\_rca

## Issue Fields
- **Type**: FW Bug
- **Labels**: BSOD
- **Priority**: Highest
- **Component**: FW
- **Affects Version/s**: FwVersion880
- **Resolution**: Unresolved
- **Status**: In Progress
- **Severity**: Major
- **Report department**: SV
- **Root Cause**: Undefined
- **Action**: 0301: BSOD observed
0302: Retest in progress

## Description
Enter S4, resume, then run CrystalDiskMark. Actual result: black screen.

## Root Cause
Undefined

## Action
0301: BSOD observed
0302: Retest in progress

## Comments
- **SV (2026-04-18T09:05:00Z)**: Multiple platforms show BSOD. UART log shows admin create queue failed.
- **FW (2026-04-18T09:20:00Z)**: Minidump and logs show Max Queue Exceeded. Suspect BIOS compatibility; enlarge MQES and provide debug FW.

## Comments
- SV: Multiple platforms show BSOD. UART log shows admin create queue failed.
- FW: Minidump and logs show Max Queue Exceeded. Suspect BIOS compatibility; enlarge MQES and provide debug FW.
search_query: [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4 BSOD # SSD-SAMPLE-1 [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4  ## Issue Type

shared_retrieval_bundle.query: [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4 BSOD # SSD-SAMPLE-1 [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4  ## Issue Type

results.title: NVM Express Base Specification Revision 2.1

content_blocks.text: When set to '1', the controller is ready to process commands. The host shall not submit commands when CSTS.RDY is '0'.
Admin Submission Queue and Admin Completion Queue shall be created before I/O queues.
The controller shall complete all outstanding commands before entering a lower power state.
Log Page 07h: Telemetry Host-Initiated. Log Page 08h: Telemetry Controller-Initiated. Data Area 2 size is reported in the log header.

results.text: NVM Express Base Specification Revision 2.1 When set to '1', the controller is ready to process commands. The host shall not submit commands when CSTS.RDY is '0'. Admin Submission Queue and Admin Completion Queue shall be created before I/O queues. The controller shall complete all outstanding commands before entering a lower power state. Log Page 07h: Telemetry Host-Initiated. Log Page 08h: Telemetry Controller-Initiated. Data Area 2 size is reported in the log header. Controller Ready (CSTS.RDY) Admin Queue Creation Power State Transitions Telemetry Log Pages

results.title: NVMe Resume Timeout Debug Guide

content_blocks.text: Device enumerates successfully after resume. First admin or I/O command times out; retry may succeed.
CAP / CC / CSTS timeline, queue recreate timestamp, first command submit timestamp, OS timeout event, UART around ready transition.
Controller ready bit asserted before queue restore fully completes.

followup_results.title: SPOR Rebuild Flow Ordering Notes

content_blocks.text: Load metadata header, recover GC state, recover valid-page count snapshot, rebuild free-block bitmap, run metadata consistency check.
If free-block rebuild runs before GC metadata restore, blocks may be misclassified as reusable.
Power cycle drop, ROM mode, metadata CRC mismatch, free SLC count mismatch.

followup_results.text: SPOR Rebuild Flow Ordering Notes Load metadata header, recover GC state, recover valid-page count snapshot, rebuild free-block bitmap, run metadata consistency check. If free-block rebuild runs before GC metadata restore, blocks may be misclassified as reusable. Power cycle drop, ROM mode, metadata CRC mismatch, free SLC count mismatch. Required Ordering Failure Mode Observable Symptoms

rca.prompt:
章节：根因分析
章节版本：v1
解释可能的根本原因、失效机制，以及哪些证据支持或削弱根因假设。
要求：
- 识别直接原因和根本原因
- 分析失效的触发条件和传播路径
- 引用具体的日志、错误代码、规格条款
- 评估证据的可信度和完整性

## Jira问题上下文
# [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4

- Issue: SSD-SAMPLE-1
- Version: 2026-04-18T09:00:00Z
- Source: jira

## Issue Fields
- Action: 0301: BSOD observed
0302: Retest in progress
- Affects Version/s: FwVersion880
- Component: FW
- Labels: BSOD
- Priority: Highest
- Report department: SV
- Resolution: Unresolved
- Root Cause: Undefined
- Severity: Major
- Status: In Progress
- Type: FW Bug

## Jira Markdown
# SSD-SAMPLE-1 [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4

## Issue Type
- **Type**: FW Bug
- **Family**: defect
- **Route**: fw\_bug\_rca

## Issue Fields
- **Type**: FW Bug
- **Labels**: BSOD
- **Priority**: Highest
- **Component**: FW
- **Affects Version/s**: FwVersion880
- **Resolution**: Unresolved
- **Status**: In Progress
- **Severity**: Major
- **Report department**: SV
- **Root Cause**: Undefined
- **Action**: 0301: BSOD observed
0302: Retest in progress

## Description
Enter S4, resume, then run CrystalDiskMark. Actual result: black screen.

## Root Cause
Undefined

## Action
0301: BSOD observed
0302: Retest in progress

## Comments
- **SV (2026-04-18T09:05:00Z)**: Multiple platforms show BSOD. UART log shows admin create queue failed.
- **FW (2026-04-18T09:20:00Z)**: Minidump and logs show Max Queue Exceeded. Suspect BIOS compatibility; enlarge MQES and provide debug FW.

## Comments
- SV: Multiple platforms show BSOD. UART log shows admin create queue failed.
- FW: Minidump and logs show Max Queue Exceeded. Suspect BIOS compatibility; enlarge MQES and provide debug FW.

## 共享检索证据
- NVMe-2.1-2024 v2024-08-05: When set to '1', the controller is ready to process commands. The host shall not submit commands when CSTS.RDY is '0'.

Admin Submission Queue and Admin Completion Queue shall be created before I/O queues.

The controller shall complete all outstanding commands before entering a lower power state.
- CONF-DEMO-1 v2026-04-18T09:00:00Z: Device enumerates successfully after resume. First admin or I/O command times out; retry may succeed.

CAP / CC / CSTS timeline, queue recreate timestamp, first command submit timestamp, OS timeout event, UART around ready transition.

Controller ready bit asserted before queue restore fully completes.
- CONF-DEMO-3 v2026-04-18T09:20:00Z: Load metadata header, recover GC state, recover valid-page count snapshot, rebuild free-block bitmap, run metadata consistency check.

If free-block rebuild runs before GC metadata restore, blocks may be misclassified as reusable.

Power cycle drop, ROM mode, metadata CRC mismatch, free SLC count mismatch.

请使用中文输出分析结果。

# 深度分析报告：[SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4

问题ID：SSD-SAMPLE-1

## 根因分析

Mock local model answer

### 证据

- `NVMe-2.1-2024` v2024-08-05: When set to '1', the controller is ready to process commands. The host shall not submit commands when CSTS.RDY is '0'.

Admin Submission Queue and Admin Completion Queue shall be created before I/O queues.

The controller shall complete all outstanding commands before entering a lower power state.
- `CONF-DEMO-1` v2026-04-18T09:00:00Z: Device enumerates successfully after resume. First admin or I/O command times out; retry may succeed.

CAP / CC / CSTS timeline, queue recreate timestamp, first command submit timestamp, OS timeout event, UART around ready transition.

Controller ready bit asserted before queue restore fully completes.
- `CONF-DEMO-3` v2026-04-18T09:20:00Z: Load metadata header, recover GC state, recover valid-page count snapshot, rebuild free-block bitmap, run metadata consistency check.

If free-block rebuild runs before GC metadata restore, blocks may be misclassified as reusable.

Power cycle drop, ROM mode, metadata CRC mismatch, free SLC count mismatch.

问题ID：SSD-SAMPLE-1

## 根因分析

Mock local model answer

### 证据

- `NVMe-2.1-2024` v2024-08-05: When set to '1', the controller is ready to process commands. The host shall not submit commands when CSTS.RDY is '0'.

Admin Submission Queue and Admin Completion Queue shall be created before I/O queues.

The controller shall complete all outstanding commands before entering a lower power state.
- `CONF-DEMO-1` v2026-04-18T09:00:00Z: Device enumerates successfully after resume. First admin or I/O command times out; retry may succeed.

CAP / CC / CSTS timeline, queue recreate timestamp, first command submit timestamp, OS timeout event, UART around ready transition.

Controller ready bit asserted before queue restore fully completes.
- `CONF-DEMO-3` v2026-04-18T09:20:00Z: Load metadata header, recover GC state, recover valid-page count snapshot, rebuild free-block bitmap, run metadata consistency check.

If free-block rebuild runs before GC metadata restore, blocks may be misclassified as reusable.

Power cycle drop, ROM mode, metadata CRC mismatch, free SLC count mismatch.

章节产物：`section_outputs/rca.json`

analysis_prompt:
你是一位SSD固件缺陷根因分析专家。
基于检索到的Confluence文档和规格说明证据，对此Jira缺陷问题进行深度根因分析。
分析要求：
1. 根因识别：分析可能的根本原因，包括代码逻辑、配置错误、时序问题、资源竞争等
2. 失效机制：解释问题是如何发生的，触发条件和传播路径
3. 影响评估：评估问题的严重程度、影响范围（功能模块、性能、数据完整性）
4. 证据链：引用具体的规格条款、设计文档、测试结果来支撑分析结论
5. 修复建议：提供具体的修复方案，包括代码修改点、配置调整、测试验证方法
6. 预防措施：建议如何避免类似问题再次发生
模式：平衡证据审查
区分直接证据和合理推断。
指出不确定性以及需要哪些额外证据来加强结论。

输出格式：
1. 概述：简明的问题概览
2. 跨源证据：引用Confluence和规格证据，标注文档ID
3. 分析：根据问题类型进行根因/追溯/影响分析
4. 差距：缺失的证据或未解答的问题
5. 建议：建议的后续步骤
